species.description: The Arapaima is a true icon of freshwater fishing.

content.title: Mastery Series: Arapaima at Legendary Arapaima Ground 535
content.description: Mastering the Arapaima in Canada requires more than just luck. It requires an intimate understanding of the underwater topography and the specific bait cycles of Legendary Arapaima Ground 535.

fishing.regulations: Strict catch and release policies are in effect. Barbless hooks only.

editorial.introduction: Mastering the Arapaima in Canada requires more than just luck. It requires an intimate understanding of the underwater topography and the specific bait cycles of Legendary Arapaima Ground 535.

quote.text: Technical proficiency beats raw power every time when it comes to the Arapaima.
quote.author: Capt. Fisherman 535

sections.heading: Reading the Water
sections.body:
Look for the subtle current seams near the volcanic drop-offs. The Arapaima use these as ambush points, waiting for the tide to push baitfish through the channel.

Local experts emphasize that the key to success is staying mobile and checking your drag settings constantly.

sections.heading: Lure Selection and Presentation
sections.body:
Matching the hatch is critical. If the local bait is small, downsize your profile but increase your action. A slow, rhythmic retrieve often yields the best results.

Local experts emphasize that the key to success is staying mobile and checking your drag settings constantly.
